name: Meilin Fisher
title: Companion

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Pre-Casting
basic.description: Meilin swings her whip in front of herself.

core.name: Side Whip
core.description: Meilin sweeps the surrounding area with her water whip. Final hit inflicts [Airborne].

skill.name: Rear Lash
skill.description: Meilin swings her whip down on top of enemies, then throws them into the air, pulling them towards her. Restores HP to all team members equal to 5% of Meilin Fisher's HP on hit.

skill.name: Up!
skill.description: Meilin jumps and summons giant Berry paws that come together to strike enemies. Grants [So Cute!] (Core Attack damage +8%, 8s) to all team members. Removes target's [Shield].

support.name: Help, Berry!
support.description: Berry's giant paws strike enemies multiple times. Restores user's HP by 8% of Meilin's Max HP. Grants [Berry, I'm Pumped Up!] (Attack +16%, Damage Taken -16%, 16s). Removes target's Shield.

qte.name: Cat Rush
qte.description: Meilin runs forward, reeling Berry in from underground. Berry leaps up from the ground, flies straight ahead, and dives back into the ground with a splash.

ultimate.name: Big Meow!
ultimate.description: Meilin reels Berry in and flings him up high. Berry does a belly flop and crushes everything around him. Grants [Pumped Up!] (Attack +8%, Defense +8%, Critical Rate +8%, Core Attack damage +8%, Damage Taken -8%, 24s) to all team members.

passive.name: Cuddle Puddle / Bye, Meow!
passive.description: Rear Lash or Cat Rush hitting inflicts [Cuddle Puddle] on target (Water damage taken +8%, 16s). Using Side Whip or Up! or tagging out grants [Bye, Meow!] to all team members (Attack +8%, Defense +8%, 16s, stacks x3).

advancements: Up! damage increases by 64%. Using Side Whip or Up! grants [Cat Butler] to the team member with the highest Attack (takes 64% of their damage, Super Armor, 8s). [So Cute!] upgraded: Core Attack damage +32%.
Increases all team members' Attack and Defense by 8%. Additionally increases Attack and Defense of Water element team members by 8%.
When Rear Lash hits, all team members' Power Gauges charge by 8%. When Rear Lash hits Elite or higher monsters, Power Gauges charge by an additional 8%.
[Pumped Up!] upgraded: Attack +16%, Defense +16%, Critical Rate +16%, Core Attack damage +16%, Damage Taken -16%, 24s.
